hooks.description: [Phase 3 cutover] Soft cleanup checklist after gh pr merge (replaces post-merge-cleanup-reminder.sh)
[Phase 2 new] After successful gh pr create or gh pr ready, emit additionalContext to arm Monitor + MONITOR_ARM_REQUIRED sentinel (ATTACK 9)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn on edits to architecture/** without ARCH_PLAN_EVIDENCE env (no deny path; PR #74 retired BLOCKING tier)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn on writes to capability-path kernels without ARCH_PLAN_EVIDENCE (no deny path; PR #74 retired BLOCKING tier; sunset 2026-08-04)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn when maintenance worker targets governance files without dry-run verification (ADVISORY only)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Citation grep-gate — drift in file:line citations within Edit/Write args
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn before git commit when invariant pytest baseline regresses (no deny path; PR #74 retired BLOCKING tier)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn before git commit if gitleaks finds secret patterns in staged content (no deny path; PR #74 retired BLOCKING tier)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Conflict-first guidance + MERGE_AUDIT_EVIDENCE warning on protected branches (no deny path; PR #74 retired BLOCKING tier)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn on broad git add in main worktree (co-tenant absorption risk; no deny path; PR #74 retired BLOCKING tier)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn on git checkout/switch when tracked modifications overlap target branch tree (silent revert prevention; no deny path; PR #74 retired BLOCKING tier)
[A1 BLOCKING] Block gh pr create/ready when commits < 2 AND LOC < 300 since merge-base (both conditions required). Bypass: ZEUS_PR_ALLOW_TINY=1
[B2 BLOCKING] Block gh pr merge when PR age <600s, unresolved Codex P0/P1, or CHANGES_REQUESTED. Bypass: ZEUS_PR_MERGE_FORCE=1
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn on gh pr comment / thread reply commands; fix-commit IS the response, not a reply paragraph (P2 backstop)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Warn when maintenance worker targets governance files without dry-run verification (ADVISORY only)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Detect git branch creation in PRIMARY worktree (2026-05-17 antibody)
[Phase 2 new] Advisory: when phase-class subagent returns with tracked uncommitted changes, emit commit reminder
[hook v2 ADVISORY] On session start, emit cross-worktree visibility summary via worktree_doctor (ADVISORY only)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] After WorktreeCreate, emit naming policy + scope + sentinel write advisory (ADVISORY only)
[hook v2 ADVISORY] Before WorktreeRemove, emit pre-remove dirty/uncommitted check + branch closure suggestion (ADVISORY only)
